headlines.layman: A key electroweak UV structure was upgraded to publicly verifiable support.
headlines.student: Exclusive-U1 UV weak-mixing invariant promoted to supported.
headlines.physicist: WEINBERG-UV-001 promoted to supported with invariant theorem stack.

significance_summaries.layman: This is one of the strongest current pillars in the whole program.
significance_summaries.student: The UV electroweak structural value is now backed by formal invariance evidence.
significance_summaries.physicist: Locks a high-value UV structural invariant used as a prerequisite in electroweak closure.

not_claimed: This does not claim final Z-pole value derivation.

headlines.layman: The Weinberg-angle program entered a constrained, testable phase.
headlines.student: WEINBERG-001 moved to partial with locked policy tests.
headlines.physicist: WEINBERG-001 promoted to partial with governance-constrained H2 battery artifacts.

significance_summaries.layman: This keeps the project honest by separating what is proven from what is still open.
significance_summaries.student: The claim now has explicit batteries and anti-retrofitting controls.
significance_summaries.physicist: Formalizes gap-closure workflow without allowing post-hoc tuning.

not_claimed: No final measurement-scale closure is claimed here.

headlines.layman: Lepton phase-clock structure entered active testing.
headlines.student: Lepton orbit program moved from stub to active hypothesis.
headlines.physicist: LEPTON-001 promoted to active_hypothesis on period-4 orbit backbone.

significance_summaries.layman: The model now has a concrete path for explaining lepton family structure.
significance_summaries.student: Period-4 algebraic orbit results now drive a focused lepton-closure track.
significance_summaries.physicist: Transitions lepton-mass work into a live, test-backed hypothesis lane.

not_claimed: Muon-electron mass-ratio closure is still open.

headlines.layman: The vacuum symmetry backbone was reconciled into one coherent gauge profile.
headlines.student: Gauge stabilizer structure advanced to partial with S4-compatible stack.
headlines.physicist: GAUGE-001 promoted to partial with vacuum-stabilizer action artifacts.

significance_summaries.layman: This is a foundational symmetry lock that later force and constant results depend on.
significance_summaries.student: It reduces gauge-structure ambiguity in downstream derivations.
significance_summaries.physicist: Constrains downstream electroweak/strong derivations to a fixed stabilizer profile.

not_claimed: This does not by itself derive all Standard Model couplings.

headlines.layman: A structured strong-force baseline is now reproducible in the model.
headlines.student: Strong-coupling proxy advanced to partial with fixed-ratio baseline.
headlines.physicist: STRONG-001 promoted to partial with 24/168 baseline and battery checks.

significance_summaries.layman: This gives a concrete number to test instead of hand-wavy force language.
significance_summaries.student: The model now has a stable strong-coupling proxy with a quantified gap.
significance_summaries.physicist: Locks a discrete symmetry-ratio baseline for alpha_s closure work.

not_claimed: Running-corrected closure at physical scale remains open.

headlines.layman: Photon-vacuum behavior now has a formal color-exclusion proof path.
headlines.student: Photon vacuum-orbit color-sector exclusion reached partial.
headlines.physicist: PHOTON-001 promoted to partial via vacuum-orbit color-sector-zero artifacts.

significance_summaries.layman: It explains why one interaction channel stays 'clean' in the model.
significance_summaries.student: A sharp selection rule now exists for photon-vacuum propagation.
significance_summaries.physicist: Locks color-sector exclusion constraints for current photon/vacuum semantics.

headlines.layman: Mass-as-computational-drag moved from idea to validated model component.
headlines.physicist: MASS-001 promoted to partial with monotonic tick-mass artifact stack.

significance_summaries.layman: It gives a concrete way to measure mass from the graph's own update work.
significance_summaries.student: Mass proxies are now tied to explicit kernel observables instead of prose.
significance_summaries.physicist: Provides formal monotonicity hooks for energy/mass observable unification.

not_claimed: SI calibration is not closed yet.

headlines.layman: The lab proved its update rules can avoid race-condition chaos.
headlines.physicist: RACE-001 promoted to partial with confluence and classification artifacts.

significance_summaries.layman: This helps ensure repeated runs produce consistent science.
significance_summaries.student: Deterministic replay reliability improved through formal race controls.
significance_summaries.physicist: Strengthens scheduler determinism assumptions used by kernel-level claims.

not_claimed: Many-body stress coverage is still in progress.

headlines.layman: Distance in the causal graph now has machine-checked triangle behavior.
headlines.student: Graph-distance triangle semantics moved to partial.
headlines.physicist: DIST-001 promoted to partial via formal DAG distance constraints.

significance_summaries.layman: It gives the project a trustworthy notion of 'how far apart' two events are.
significance_summaries.student: This is required before any larger spacetime interpretation can be taken seriously.
significance_summaries.physicist: Locks a geometric primitive needed for causal metric interpretation work.

not_claimed: This is not yet a full relativistic spacetime derivation.

headlines.layman: The core math engine behind COG time ticks was formally locked.
headlines.student: Alternativity and non-associative witness moved into validated core stack.
headlines.physicist: ALG-001 promoted to partial with alternativity and explicit non-associative witness artifacts.

significance_summaries.layman: This is the foundation that makes the model evolve step-by-step instead of all at once.
significance_summaries.student: It secures the algebraic reason update ordering matters in COG.
significance_summaries.physicist: Locks the alternativity substrate required for deterministic non-associative update semantics.

not_claimed: This does not yet derive measured particle masses by itself.
